scenarioResults.name: Baseline: 3 Timezones with Conflicts
issues: Booked slot but likely violates working hours for someone

scenarioResults.name: Large Group: 8 People, Scattered Timezones
issues: 8 timezones - high likelihood of working hour violation

scenarioResults.name: PTO/Vacation: Attendee Out of Office
issues: Scheduled during attendee PTO - will show as conflict

scenarioResults.name: One Person Out of Sync
issues: Booked slot but likely violates working hours for someone

scenarioResults.name: Night Owl Team
issues: Assumed 9-5 schedule - night owls not recognized

scenarioResults.name: Recurring Weekly Meeting
issues: Booked slot but likely violates working hours for someone

scenarioResults.name: Async-First Team
issues: Booked slot but likely violates working hours for someone

scenarioResults.name: Cross-Cultural: Religious Holidays
issues: Booked slot but likely violates working hours for someone

findings.title: Timezone Blindness
findings.finding: Piper does not respect working hours across timezones
findings.impact: Users in minority timezones get booked outside working hours

findings.title: No Special Case Handling
findings.finding: Piper assumes standard 9-5 Mon-Fri for everyone
findings.impact: Fails for non-standard schedules and missing key blockers

findings.title: Strength in Simple Cases
findings.finding: Piper handles same-timezone, low-conflict scenarios well

findings.title: No Alternatives or Negotiation
findings.finding: Piper books first available slot, period

findings.title: Impossible Cases Unhandled
findings.finding: When no slot exists, Piper fails ungracefully
findings.impact: Should suggest rescheduling existing meetings, offer async, etc.

harnessInsights.title: Reproducibility at Scale
harnessInsights.insight: 15 scenarios ran deterministically - results are 100% repeatable
harnessInsights.value: Developers can iterate knowing they're measuring the same thing

harnessInsights.title: Coverage of Edge Cases
harnessInsights.insight: Revealed gaps in 8+ categories that real users hit
harnessInsights.value: Better to find these before shipping than via support tickets

harnessInsights.title: Severity Ranking
harnessInsights.insight: Different scenarios score differently - enables prioritization
harnessInsights.value: Engineering knows which 20% of work gets 80% of value

harnessInsights.title: Strength Identification
harnessInsights.value: Product should emphasize strengths in marketing/UX

harnessInsights.title: Data-Driven Roadmap
harnessInsights.insight: Can now rank improvements by impact on test portfolio
harnessInsights.value: Fix timezone handling → affects 8 scenarios | Fix alternatives → affects 5 scenarios

recommendations.feature: Alternative time suggestions with trade-off analysis
Support for non-standard schedules (flex, night shift, async)
